ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betting session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the bets */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the betting session */,
  "starting_bankroll" REAL /* Starting bankroll for the session */,
  "ending_bankroll" REAL /* Ending bankroll after the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the betting session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bets" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the betting session that this bet belongs to */,
  "amount_bet" REAL /* Amount wagered on the bet */,
  "bet_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bet type */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the bet (e.g., won, lost) */,
  "profits" REAL /* Profits earned or lost from the bet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bet was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bet was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES betting_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_bet_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("bet_type_id") REFERENCES bet_types ("bet_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bet_types" (
  "bet_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of bet */,
  "bet_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the bet type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bet type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bet type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bet type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profit_loss_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profit/loss record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the record */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss amount recorded */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the record was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profit_loss_records_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bankrolls" (
  "bankroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bankroll record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the bankroll */,
  "starting_amount" REAL /* Starting amount of the bankroll */,
  "current_amount" REAL /* Current amount after betting activities */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bankroll was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bankroll was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bankroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bankrolls_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_limits" (
  "limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each limit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the limits */,
  "daily_limit" REAL /* Daily betting limit set by the user */,
  "weekly_limit" REAL /* Weekly betting limit set by the user */,
  "monthly_limit" REAL /* Monthly betting limit set by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the limit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the limit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_limits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the analytics */,
  "total_bets" INTEGER /* Total number of bets placed by the user */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins by the user */,
  "total_profits" REAL /* Total profits made by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., bankroll drop, limit reached) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold for the alert to trigger */,
  "is_triggered" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert has been triggered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_details" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session detail */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "total_bets" INTEGER /* Total number of bets placed during the session */,
  "total_won" INTEGER /* Total number of wins during the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_details_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betting history record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the betting history */,
  "betting_session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the betting session */,
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bet */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of the bet (e.g., moneyline, point spread) */,
  "amount_bet" REAL /* Amount wagered on the bet */,
  "profits" REAL /* Profits earned or lost from the bet */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the bet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_history_betting_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("betting_session_id") REFERENCES betting_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_history_bet_id FOREIGN KEY ("bet_id") REFERENCES bets ("bet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk management record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the risk management */,
  "bankroll_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the bankroll used for betting */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the user (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the risk management was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the risk management was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the performance */,
  "total_bets" INTEGER /* Total number of bets placed by the user */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins by the user */,
  "total_profits" REAL /* Total profits made by the user */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_performance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
